name: Spongies Character Customisation [B42.16+] - Details Pack
description: This mod adds freckles, moles, scars, and other details to your body model. <LINE> Please note: this is the basic details pack and is designed for vanilla 256x256 textures. <LINE> <LINE> Using only this mod with Hi-Res body mods or textures will cause seams. <LINE> If you need high-resolution versions, load Details Pack HD Textures directly after this mod.
